description: Planning-strategy engine lifecycle hooks. Plan-before-code, prompt-only.

hooks.prompt:
DOMAIN: planning-strategy
IF task involves: project planning, architecture decisions, ADRs, PRDs, task decomposition, epic breakdown, trade-off analysis, or system design evaluation
THEN: Read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/SKILL.md before responding. Classify into one primary surface: product-requirements, architecture-decisions, task-coordination, agent-reasoning, lattice-coordination, or recall-governed-planning.
RATIONALE: 90% Planning / 10% Execution. Code is a liability — only write it once the data models, boundaries, and flows are proven.
IF_SKIP: Risk building without a plan, missing rejected alternatives, or repeating past mistakes.

VERIFY: If this session involved planning or architecture decisions, was a structured ADR or task plan produced? Were rejected alternatives documented?
IF_NO: Continue and consult ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/references/architecture-decisions.md to capture the decision rationale before completing.
